title: This boat is MINE!
description: Allows you to get any mob off your boat or some vehicle else by Shift + Right Click.
body:
> Have you encounter the scenes: You sail boat (especially a chest boat) far away from home to collect some rare resource. You'd fully loaded, then a pet you tamed on this road some like allay occupied your boat.
>
>You can't sail back home unless you damage your pet or destroy your boat, pick your treasure and put it again.
>
>It's a true story. But why you need to do that?

# This boat is MINE! 

A tiny, simply and cruddy server-side mod that allows you to get any mob off your boat or some vehicle else by **`Shift + Right Click`**.

- Only affect mobs which is riding, has not disturb normal interaction.
- Only five lines in main class. No config, no hurt. Just install and use, or delete at any time.

Server side only is OK. Client side only please contact your server admin.

## Dependence

Available for Forge & Fabric in a same jar.

- Required Architectury API.
- Fabric side also required Fabric API.
